problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
